pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-007 (AI & ML/Task) scores 0.536 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.536). Scope is in_scope for Algorithmic Trading Engineer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, AI & ML, composite 0.536. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI & ML for Algorithmic Trading Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI & ML appears in approximately 85% of Algorithmic Trading Engineer job postings. ML/quant modeling is a primary competency in algorithmic trading roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. AI & ML is market-validated for Algorithmic Trading Engineer. Final decision: include.
